title: galium mollugo subsp. lucidum
intro: Galium mollugo subsp. lucidum, also known as shiny bedstraw or glossy bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which have been shown to aid in the relief of digestive issues, such as diarrhea, and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Galium mollugo subsp. lucidum include its ability to calm the nervous system, promote relaxation, and alleviate symptoms associated with anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea, or made into a tincture, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
